issues.title: [MaxVP][P0] Bootstrap GitHub Project + live roadmap sync
body_lines: Stand up a Projects V2 board dedicated to MaxVP and wire it to the repo so roadmap items stay in sync automatically.
- Create a project named "MaxVP Agentic" with custom fields: Status, Priority, Owner, Iteration, Risk.
- Add board/table/timeline views, filters for priority, and saved view for agent-owned work.
- Run `.github/workflows/sync-agentic-roadmap.yml` with `project-number` set to the new project number so roadmap items are added automatically.
- Document the project URL and workflow invocation in the README/docs.
Acceptance criteria:
- Project exists with fields + views above.
- Roadmap sync workflow can add/update all items into the project.
- At least one run demonstrates items land in correct lanes.

issues.title: [MaxVP][P0] Codespaces + devcontainer parity
body_lines: Create a Codespaces/devcontainer definition so agent and human contributors get identical environments.
- Base on Node 20+, include npm and pnpm, and cache node_modules.
- Preconfigure scripts/tasks for `npm install`, `npm run dev`, `npm run test`, and linting.
- Surface required secrets (GEMINI_API_KEY) via devcontainer features or docs and fail fast when missing.
- Validate start-to-first-render < 2 minutes on fresh Codespace.
Acceptance criteria:
- devcontainer.json checked in and works with Codespaces.
- All repo scripts run without additional manual setup.
- Docs updated for Codespaces usage.

issues.title: [MaxVP][P1] Agentic triage for issues and PRs
body_lines: Automate intake and triage so issues/PRs are labeled, assigned, and routed without manual effort.
- Add templates for bugs/feature requests/agent tasks with required metadata (area, priority, env).
- Create automation (GitHub Action or bot) that applies labels, assigns default owners, and adds to the MaxVP project on open/update.
- Enable auto-comment with next steps/checklist for new PRs, including test matrix to run.
- Optional: auto-close stale items with clear warnings and labels.
Acceptance criteria:
- New issues/PRs receive labels and land in the project automatically.
- Templates collect the metadata listed above.
- Triage bot behavior is documented.

issues.title: [MaxVP][P1] Autonomous CI/CD lane for MaxVP
body_lines: Expand CI so agents can ship confidently with guardrails and fast feedback.
- Matrix: lint, typecheck, unit tests, build (Vite) with caching and minimal wall-clock time.
- Add preview build artifact upload (dist) for PRs and a smoke `npm run build` gate.
- Wire status checks to block merges until green; surface flaky test reporting if present.
- Add deployment hook (manual or environment-gated) to push successful builds to the target environment.
Acceptance criteria:
- CI workflow exists with the matrix above and runs on PRs.
- Artifacts are downloadable from the run.
- Checks are enforced in branch protection or documented for enablement.

issues.title: [MaxVP][P1] Agent swarm hooks for SimulationEngine + Horde
body_lines: Connect sim/agent workloads (e.g., Horde jobs in `SimulationEngine.ts`) to GitHub automation for observability and feedback loops.
- Add a workflow that can trigger Horde jobs from labels or comments and report status back to the thread.
- Persist job IDs and results in a lightweight store (repo JSON or db) for auditability.
- Emit metrics/logs to project dashboards (issue comments or project fields).
- Document how agents invoke the hook and how failures are surfaced.
Acceptance criteria:
- A manual or comment-triggered workflow can start a Horde job and post the result.
- Job metadata is stored and queryable in-repo.
- Usage is documented with examples.

issues.title: [MaxVP][P2] Runbooks + dashboards for agentic ops
body_lines: Create persistent documentation and dashboards so agents/humans can see state of the world at a glance.
- Add runbooks for triage, CI failures, and deployment with copy/paste commands.
- Maintain a living status page (md or dashboard) linked from README with key KPIs (CI pass rate, open P0s, latest deploy).
- Ensure all workflows and bots are discoverable with pointers to logs and recovery steps.
Acceptance criteria:
- Runbooks exist and are linked.
- Status page/dashboard is updated by automation or documented manual step.
- Onboarding doc references these assets.
